---
id: set-nicknames-of-group-members
title: "SetGroupMembersNickname"
description: "通过该接口批量修改群内成员在该群中的昵称。默认单次最多可修改 20 名用户的昵称，如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/group/open-api-desc
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>SetGroupMembersNickname</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


通过该接口批量修改群内成员在该群中的昵称。默认单次最多可修改 20 名用户的昵称，如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。

昵称设置成功后，群内成员通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口，收到相关通知：
| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|--------|---------|
| [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupmemberinfoupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupmemberinfoupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|---------|-----|---------|---------|
| [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| Unity3D-25% | uni-app \| uni-app x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|---------|---------|---------|
| [OnGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-u3d/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

<Note title="说明">参数 `FromUserId` 和 `UserId` 对应的用户已在客户端调用 `login` 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 完成注册。</Note>
<Note title="说明">
参数 FromUserId、GroupId、UserIds 和 Nickname 仅支持数字，英文字符和 `'!'，'#'，'$'，'%'，'&'，'('，')'，'+'，''，':'，';'，'<'，'='，'.'，'>'，'?'
，'@'，'['，']'，'^'，'_'，'{'，'}'，'|'，'~'`。
</Note>
<Note title="说明">1 次/秒，群级别限制。如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=SetGroupMembersNickname\n","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["SetGroupMembersNickname"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>

className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</strong></summary><ul className={"request-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"FromUserId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作者用户 ID。用户需已注册 ZIM 服务。","maxLength":32,"example":"zego_user"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群组 ID。","maxLength":32,"example":"groupA"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>需要被设置昵称的用户列表。</div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"用户 ID。","maxLength":32,"example":"usera"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Nickname"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 256 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"用户在群组的昵称。","maxLength":256,"example":"nicknamea"}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"openapi-markdown__details response"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-response"}><strong>Schema</strong></summary><ul className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"返回码。\n\n以下仅列出了接口业务逻辑相关的 Code 和 SubCode ，完整返回码请参考 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n<table>\n<thead><tr><th>Code / SubCode</th><th>说明</th><th>处理建议</th></tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr><td>660000002</td><td>输入参数错误。</td><td>请检查输入参数。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660000011</td><td>用户个数超过限制。</td><td>请检查输入的用户列表。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660300006</td><td>频率限制。</td><td>请稍后再试，或了解相关频率限制。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660500002</td><td>操作者用户未注册。</td><td>请让操作者先注册 ZIM 服务。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600001</td><td>群组不存在。</td><td>请确认输入的 GroupID 是否正确。</td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n","example":0}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作结果描述。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求 ID。","example":"343649807833778782"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>ErrorUsers</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>昵称设置失败用户信息。<ul><li>Code 为 0：</li><li>ErrorUsers 为空，全部指定用户昵称设置成功。</li><li>ErrorUsers 不为空，表示部分指定用户昵称设置失败，请参考 SubCode 处理。</li><li>Code 不为 0：</li><li>ErrorUsers 为空，表示参数错误、接口频率限制、系统错误。</li><li>ErrorUsers 不为空，表示全部指定用户昵称设置失败。</li></ul></div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"失败用户 ID。"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"SubCode"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"昵称设置失败的具体返回码。完整返回码请参考 Code 说明或者 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n"}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"343649807833778782\",\n  \"ErrorUsers\": [\n    {\n      \"UserId\": \"string\",\n      \"SubCode\": 0\n    }\n  ]\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
